title: What issues do you run into after creating a board from a template?
excerpt:

posts.author: andrewp (Andrzej P)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey fellow monday.com users,

I’m exploring some common challenges users face after building a board from the templates center. I’m especially interested in those repeatable issues or bottlenecks—the things you always have to fix, change, set up, or troubleshoot after starting a new board, regardless of template or workflow.

  • Are there any tasks, settings, or processes you find yourself redoing each time?
  • What annoys you or slows you down right after board creation?
  • Do you spend extra time on things like assigning team members, updating timelines, or changing board connections?

I’m asking because I’m considering building an app to help automate or simplify these steps for the community. Your feedback on the most persistent or frustrating issues would be super valuable!

Thanks for sharing your experiences!

posts.author: KirstyM (Kirsty)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI,
Firstly, If you make a template from a form, then all template generated boards are as if they are from forms and you can’t put them in a template.
Secondly the limit on the number of columns where formulas can be managed through templating is really annoying. I end up pasting the template into the column information so I can manually copy and paste it into each column if there are too many for Monday to do it.
Thanks
Kirsty
